synopsis: Following a diamond tycoon's mysterious death, a cutthroat battle over his estate erupts between his heirs and the housekeeper their father recently married.

title: Lust Stories
synopsis: Four stories that shed light on modern relationships from the viewpoint of the Indian woman, from strained marriages to sexual hiccups.

title: F1: The Academy
synopsis: Fifteen young women break barriers in one of the world's most demanding sports as they race to get a female driver back on the Formula 1 grid.

title: The Boyfriend
synopsis: Single men from diverse backgrounds gather in a sunny ocean-side house to live and work together for one summer – will romance brew or end bittersweet?

title: Pop Star Academy: KATSEYE
synopsis: Pop Star Academy: KATSEYE follows 20 contestants from around the world over a year-long journey as they compete to become KATSEYE, a one-of-a-kind global girl group formed using KPOP methodologies. With unprecedented access, unfolding over eight episodes, the result is a compelling portrayal of the road to international stardom, including insight into the unique training and development program developed by HYBE and Geffen Records.

title: The Man with 1000 Kids
synopsis: The Man With 1000 Kids uncovers the gripping tale of a charming Dutch scammer, Jonathan Meijer, who is accused of travelling the world deceiving mothers into having his babies on a mass scale. The three-part series investigates the murky world of the fertility industry and uncovers how due to a lack of global regulations, some international fertility clinics continue to allow anonymous donations.

title: Simone Biles Rising
synopsis: Follow gymnast Simone Biles as she balances her personal life, mental health journey and training ahead of a highly anticipated return to the Olympics.

title: SPRINT
synopsis: Elite sprinters navigate training, media scrutiny and fierce competition in this sports series following their race to become the world's fastest humans.

title: Dirty Pop: The Boy Band Scam
synopsis: Members of NSYNC, Backstreet Boys and O-Town reflect on their rise to stardom under a notorious talent manager in this hard-hitting docuseries.

title: Wyatt Earp and the Cowboy War
synopsis: The true story of Wyatt Earp, his legendary Vendetta Ride, and how his famed gunfight at the OK Corral gained national and international attention that nearly sparked a second Civil War.

title: Motel Transylvania
synopsis: No synopsis available.

title: What the Love! with Karan Johar
synopsis: With help from celebrity guests and a glam squad, filmmaker Karan Johar mentors six singletons through their personal struggles as they look for love.

title: Agatha Christie's Seven Dials

It will be up to the unlikeliest of sleuths — the fizzingly inquisitive Lady Eileen 'Bundle' Brent — to unravel a chilling plot that will change her life, cracking wide open the country house mystery.

title: Pedaço de Mim
synopsis: Due to a rare phenomenon, a woman finds herself pregnant with twins by two men. Over time, she strives to keep her family united — and her secrets hidden.

title: Tokyo Swindlers
synopsis: Can a group of real estate scammers pull off a 10-billion-yen scam without getting caught? This is the intriguing premise of Tokyo Swindlers, a masterful crime thriller about realty fraudsters driven by greed.

title: The Bahatis Empire
synopsis: Hitmaker Bahati and his singer wife, Diana, navigate infidelity rumors, parenthood and the weight of fame while living the high life in Nairobi.

title: Wonderoos
synopsis: Join animal pals Kiki, Dewey, Hazzy, Luly and Teshi as they learn how to make friends, try new foods and face other big firsts in colorful Roo City!

title: Òlòtūré: The Journey
synopsis: Working undercover as a sex worker in Nigeria, a young journalist out to expose corruption fights for her life as she forges a path to Europe.

title: Resurrected Rides
synopsis: A charming host works with skilled car experts to transform beat-up vehicles into outlandish rides that exceed their unsuspecting owners' wildest dreams.

title: LALIGA: Más Allá Del Gol
synopsis: Featuring Griezmann, Lewandowski, Rakitić and Isco, this thrilling docuseries grants exclusive behind-the-scenes access to the 23/24 season of LALIGA.

title: Hostage
synopsis: Abigail Dalton the recently elected British Prime Minister is fighting for office thanks to a healthcare crisis. Vivienne Toussaint is the first female French President campaigning for re-election no matter what — including tackling France's borders.A summit between the two women could be the answer to their prayers if they can agree. But when Dalton's husband is kidnapped and Toussaint is blackmailed, they both face unimaginable choices. Forced into a fierce rivalry where their political futures, and lives, might hang in the balance, can they work together to uncover the plot that threatens them both?

title: Chastity High
synopsis: When an ultra-elite high school enforces a strict "No Romance" rule that expels anyone caught dating, a student secretly helps her classmates for cash.

title: Idź Przodem, Bracie
synopsis: After inheriting a hefty debt, an ex-special ops officer — now guarding a shopping mall — spots an opportunity to solve his financial predicament.

title: Sirens
synopsis: Devon thinks her sister Simone has a really creepy relationship with her new boss, the enigmatic socialite Michaela Kell. Michaela's cult-ish life of luxury is like a drug to Simone, and Devon has decided it's time for an intervention, but she has no idea what a formidable opponent Michaela will be. Told over the course of one explosive weekend at The Kells' lavish beach estate, Sirens is an incisive, sexy, and darkly funny exploration of women, power, and class.

title: Soul Mate
synopsis: Haunted by guilt and doubt, Ryu flees Japan for Berlin and is saved by Korean boxer Johan. Their chance encounter binds their destiny for years to come.

title: Il caso Yara: oltre ogni ragionevole dubbio
synopsis: This docuseries digs into the disappearance of 13-year-old Yara and the disconcerting investigation that shattered the peace of a small Italian town.

title: The Influencer
synopsis: YouTube, TikTok, Instagram — 77 elite influencers flaunt their skills to strategically draw the most attention in this high-stakes social survival show.

title: Tribhuvan Mishra CA Topper
synopsis: A banking crisis forces CA topper Tribhuvan Mishra to take up sex work. Will this dual existence alleviate his troubles — or create entirely new ones?

title: Best of The Great Indian Kapil Show
synopsis: Revisit the laughs, merrymaking and heartwarming moments from Kapil's stage with his gang of celebrity guests.

title: GG Precinct
synopsis: Words can kill — especially when they become the morbid inspirations of a twisted killer. A thrilling spinoff from the creators of "Marry My Dead Body."

title: Something Very Bad is Going to Happen
synopsis: An atmospheric horror series set at a wedding, following a bride and groom in the week leading up to their ill-fated nuptials.

Unlike the iconic "Crush Gals" duo, Chigusa Nagayo and Lioness Asuka, Matsumoto made her mark as the most famous heel. Dominating television screens, they became a cultural phenomenon, captivating Japan.

title: Territory

Sensing this once great dynasty is in decline, the outback's most powerful factions – rival cattle barons, desert gangsters, Indigenous elders and billionaire miners – move in for the kill.

title: Worst Ex Ever
synopsis: The end of their relationship marked the start of a nightmare. This docuseries examines the dark truths lurking within seemingly loving partners.

title: Adolescence
synopsis: Adolescence tells the story of how a family's world is turned upside down when 13-year-old Jamie Miller is arrested and charged with the murder of a teenage girl who goes to his school.

title: Terror Tuesday: Extreme
synopsis: Inspired by the Thai horror radio show "Angkhan Khlumpong," this series presents eight stories based on real-life experiences shared by listeners.

title: A-List to Playlist
synopsis: With a 20-year acting career, Cho Jung Seok takes on the challenge of debuting as a singer in 100 days, mobilizing his entire network against the clock!

title: His & Hers
synopsis: Set in the sweltering heat of Atlanta, Anna lives in haunting reclusion, fading away from her friends and career as a journalist. But when she overhears talk about a murder in Dahlonega — the sleepy north Georgia town where she grew up — Anna is snapped back to life, pouncing on the case and searching for answers. Detective Jack Harper is strangely suspicious of her involvement, chasing her into the crosshairs of his own investigation.

title: Haseen Dillruba
synopsis: No synopsis available.

title: Salvador
synopsis: Salvador tells the story of a father who discovers that his daughter belongs to a neo-Nazi group, which he must approach in order to try to rescue her and understand what led her there. During a violent confrontation arranged between the radical fans of two football clubs, Salvador Aguirre, an ambulance driver, rescues his daughter Milena, injured and a member of the ultra-group, which defends racist, violent, and homophobic values, completely opposed to those he instilled in her.

title: Love Is Blind: México
synopsis: Magical proposals. A idyllic retreat. A hefty dose of reality. The Emmy-nominated experiment arrives in Mexico to test if love truly is blind.

title: Voetbalouders
synopsis: When the parents of a youth football team turn out to be more competitive than their kids, their antics on the sidelines soak up all the attention.

title: American Murder: Laci Peterson
synopsis: In this riveting true-crime docuseries, loved ones, experts and jurors revisit Laci Peterson's disappearance and the ensuing murder investigation.

title: Blue Ribbon Baking Championship
synopsis: Blue ribbon-winning bakers from state fairs across the US face off for the first time in an epic baking showdown to win top honors and $100,000.

title: Penelope
synopsis: A restless teenager who questions her place in the world embarks on a soul-searching journey into the remote wilderness of the Pacific Northwest.

title: Accidente
synopsis: When a birthday party takes a tragic turn, its ripples shatter a close-knit community — tearing families, friendships and hearts apart.

title: Envidiosa
synopsis: After a devastating breakup, Vicky, almost 40, embarks on a quest for new love, unaware it will lead her to a profound—and hilarious—self-discovery.

title: The Royals
synopsis: A young prince, astonishingly charming and unforgivably sexy with not a hint of shyness, was not expecting cupid to strike when he meets the prodigy girl who helms the leading startup of luxury homestays in India. Two worlds, one of a dwindling aristocracy, and the other of racing capitalism converge and throw up a whirlwind of clashing ambitions, steamy romance, chic couture and fashion-forward Instagrammable moments. This is a breezy zoomer romcom served up with a side of dreamy palace life, under the blazing royal sun.

title: What's Next? The Future with Bill Gates
synopsis: What's Next? The Future with Bill Gates the tech visionary and global health and climate philanthropist invites viewers to join him on a learning journey to explore pressing issues facing our world today.

title: Building the Band
synopsis: Building the Band brings together talented singers for a truly unique competition show where building the perfect band is all about chemistry.

title: Culinary Class Wars
synopsis: From Michelin-star chefs to amateur cooks, 100 contestants don their knives for a culinary war where you won't guess what's coming next — or who'll win.

title: Being Gordon Ramsay
synopsis: Reputation, capital and future are all at stake for Gordon's bold new bet. With kids and empire also in the mix, has he bitten off more than he can chew?

title: How to Kill Your Family
synopsis: Grace has a complicated family. Her dad is Simon Artemis, a billionaire and ruthless social climber. She's the product of an affair he claims not to remember, and Grace and her mum were left to fend for themselves. When her mother dies and she's rejected by the very people who should love her, Grace transforms her anger into something useful: killing off this estranged extended family via morbidly creative means. Grace is clawing her way towards revenge and a hefty inheritance, but her mission only pulls her further away from what it is she really needs.

title: The Grays
synopsis: A contemporary take on the Oscar Wilde classic "The Picture Of Dorian Gray" about our fascination with eternal youth set against the backdrop of the modern beauty industry. In a twist on the gothic novel, the series revolves around siblings Basil and Dorian Gray.

title: Mermaid Magic
synopsis: Protecting the ocean takes on a new meaning when a mermaid princess and her friends venture on an epic quest to the surface to defend their home.

title: Barbie Mysteries
synopsis: In this exciting animated series, teenage friends become amateur detectives and solve mysteries while traveling around the world.

title: The Trunk
synopsis: A secret marriage service is uncovered when a trunk washes up on the shore, revealing the strange marriage between a couple in the thick of it all.

title: El portal: La historia oculta de Zona Divas
synopsis: In Mexico City's dark underbelly, women seeking better lives become entangled in an online escort network, unaware it will lead to a series of femicides.

title: Live from the Other Side with Tyler Henry
synopsis: Live from the Other Side with Tyler Henry is a new live weekly series where America's #1 Medium gives celebrity guests hope, healing and long sought-after answers through emotional readings that showcase his gifts as a medium, clairvoyant and medical intuitive.

title: Ripple
synopsis: In New York City, four strangers navigate life's challenges while their separate paths unexpectedly intertwine in ways that change them forever.

title: Starting 5
synopsis: This captivating sports series follows Jimmy Butler, Anthony Edwards, LeBron James, Domantas Sabonis and Jayson Tatum throughout the 2023-24 NBA season.

title: Mr. McMahon
synopsis: WWE experienced record-breaking highs and crushing lows under Vince McMahon's leadership. This docuseries delves into the mogul's controversial reign.

title: Glaskupan
synopsis: When her friend's daughter goes missing, forensic psychologist Lejla must confront the haunting trauma of her own childhood abduction.

title: Los Reyes de Oriente
synopsis: A tight-knit crew of three reigns over a bustling barrio in Mexico City — until a sudden tragedy breaks their crowns and renders two of them rivals.

title: Born for the Spotlight
synopsis: From leading ladies to rising ingenues, women under the limelight must juggle friendship and ambition in their tenacious pursuit of art and stardom.

title: Chef's Table: Noodles

This season celebrates the cultural significance and culinary artistry of noodles, offering a deep dive into both traditional and innovative techniques.

title: Chef's Table: Legends
synopsis: The Emmy-nominated series celebrates four culinary giants — Jamie Oliver, José Andrés, Alice Waters and Thomas Keller — who changed how the world eats.

title: East of Eden
synopsis: East of Eden will explore the novel's themes of trauma and repair; love and betrayal; duty and free will. The series will sketch an intimate portrait of the Trask family against the backdrop of huge historical forces.

title: La última noche en Tremor
synopsis: A musician and composer in crisis retreats into a coastal village in the north to finish his latest work. His only neighbors for miles around are a married couple living in the next house. After a serious accident during a storm, the musician begins to experience some terrifying visions about his neighbors.

title: Ángel Di María: Romper la pared
synopsis: From his humble origins to becoming champion of the world, this documentary series recounts the life and career of the iconic Argentinian soccer player.

title: Into the Fire: The Lost Daughter
synopsis: In this riveting true-crime documentary, a determined mother partners with an amateur sleuth to solve the mystery of her birth daughter's disappearance.

title: Thumblite

title: Asalto al Banco Central
synopsis: Spain, 1981: When armed men hold up a bank and take hundreds hostage, a reporter races against the authorities to uncover the true motive for the heist.

title: Blood Legacy
synopsis: After years of estrangement, Khanyi Adesina returns home to fight for her family's business empire as it threatens to collapse under corruption.

title: timelesz project -AUDITION-
synopsis: No synopsis available.

title: Wolf King
synopsis: Wolf King set in a world where mortal man is ruled over by the Werelords, we will meet a 16-year-old shepherd boy Drew Ferran, a teen whose life is changed forever when he discovers he's the last surviving Wolf King.

title: Polo
synopsis: This rousing docuseries goes behind the scenes of professional polo, offering an unprecedented look into the players' lives on and off the field.

title: Projekt UFO
synopsis: An alleged UFO landing in Truskasy, Warmia, spurs a group's quest of self-discovery and inquiry into the origins of the extraterrestrial.

title: Our Oceans
synopsis: Dive into Our Oceans, a thrilling five-episode series, narrated by Barack Obama, that invites you to join Emmy winning wildlife filmmaker James Honeyborne on an awe-inspiring adventure. This groundbreaking show will whisk you away on a global journey, uncovering the mesmerizing stories of our planet's five majestic oceans. Each episode delves into the unique characters of the creatures within these ecosystems, from playful and cunning to resilient and mysterious. Ride along the world's great current as we reveal nature's most spectacular aquatic personalities and breathtaking wonders.

title: This is the Zodiac Speaking
synopsis: In this true-crime docuseries, a family searching for answers shares clues and eye-opening testimonies about the prime suspect in the Zodiac murders.

title: Comedy Revenge
synopsis: Comedy icons, from YouTube stars to TV veterans, gather in the ultimate competition of laughter — to be crowned the winner by the legend, Lee Kyeong-kyu.

title: Mäklarna i Marbella
synopsis: The Swedish agents at the luxury real estate firm Homerun Brokers compete for the best listings in Spain's high-end holiday destination Marbella.

title: The Manhattan Alien Abduction
synopsis: A woman claims to have been abducted from her bedroom in Manhattan. This docuseries explores whether it was an elaborate hoax — or proof of alien life.

title: Countdown: Paul vs. Tyson
synopsis: One epic bout. Two fearless boxers. Months of intense training. In this all-access docuseries, Jake Paul and Mike Tyson gear up for the fight of the year.

title: Love Is Blind Habibi
synopsis: Celebrity couple Khaled Saqer and Elham Ali host this social experiment, where Arab singles connect and commit to marriage — before meeting face-to-face.

title: El secreto del río
synopsis: When a young boy arrives in a small Mexican village, an unlikely friendship blossoms with a local kid — and a dark secret seals their bond forever.

title: Anakhot
synopsis: Exploring the intersection of Thai culture and future tech, this anthology delves into the gripping moral quandaries sparked by their inevitable clash.

title: Don't Come Home
synopsis: A mother moves into her family's eerie old mansion, where she confronts dark secrets from the past after her young daughter mysteriously vanishes.

title: Os Quatro da Candelária
synopsis: To be remembered, they must first be seen. This series reimagines a real police-led massacre in Rio de Janeiro through the eyes of four children.

title: Mr. Plankton
synopsis: Lee Yoo Mi stars as a bride-to-be whose medical conditions threatens her marriage to a family obsessed with continuing their grand lineage.

title: Cashero
synopsis: An ordinary man who inherits super strength discovers a greater evil out to steal his power. The one catch? Every use drains money from his wallet.

title: Genie, Make a Wish
synopsis: A woman becomes the master of a genie who keeps tempting her to make a wish — sparking a risky, magical connection.

title: Can This Love Be Translated?
synopsis: The emotions of a celebrity and her interpreter get lost in translation as they travel the world filming a TV show. Will love find its own language?

title: The Price of Confession
synopsis: Accused of killing her husband, a woman is offered a way out by a mysterious stranger: in exchange for a confession in her place, she must commit murder.

title: Love Is Blind: Argentina
synopsis: In this groundbreaking reality series, men and women pop the question to their soulmates — all while having no idea of what they actually look like.

title: 900 días sin Anabel
synopsis: Anabel Segura's abduction held Spain in suspense for 900 days. This docuseries explores the case through never-before-heard recordings of the kidnappers.

title: Tokyo Override
synopsis: When a lonely hacker gets entangled with a group of underground couriers, they uncover the dark truth lurking beneath Tokyo's seemingly perfect facade.

title: Asaf
synopsis: Asaf is an ordinary driver with strong moral values, trying to find a way to get his life back on track after his separation from his wife and son. Following an unfortunate traffic accident, he gets entangled with the wrong people and finds himself sucked into a world of mystery. His life will never be the same.

title: The Comeback: 2004 Boston Red Sox
synopsis: This definitive docuseries chronicles the Red Sox's journey to their first World Series title in 86 years via interviews with star players and personnel.

title: Jerry Springer: Fights, Camera, Action
synopsis: Tension, trauma and toxic relationships — and that's just the producers. Uncover the secrets of the salacious talk show, told by the people who made it.

title: Is It Cake? Holiday
synopsis: Talented bakers, unbelievable illusions and joyful holiday vibes. Is It Cake? Holiday brings back nine All Star bakers from past seasons for the ultimate holiday showdown. Across four episodes, watch as bakers return to craft tasty replicas of ice skates, wreaths, nutcrackers and more in this holiday spin on the mind-bending baking competition. Bakers will baffle the celebrity judges with their festive and delicious deceptions and fight their way to the ultimate grand prize.

title: Investigation Alien
synopsis: In this gripping docuseries, legendary reporter George Knapp travels the globe to uncover new evidence about UFOs and investigate their presence on Earth.

title: Las hermanas Guerra
synopsis: A woman's refusal to join her sister's twisted scheme sparks betrayal and revenge as she tries to reunite with her long-lost daughter in prison.

title: Cold Case: Who Killed JonBenét Ramsey
synopsis: On December 26, 1996, John and Patsy Ramsey wake up the morning after a loving family Christmas to discover their youngest child, six-year-old JonBenét, is missing, a chilling ransom note left downstairs. Later that day, John Ramsey discovers his daughter's body in the basement, revealing the shocking truth that JonBenét had not been kidnapped, but was instead sexually assaulted and brutally murdered in their own home. The Boulder, Colorado police, who had little practical experience in homicide investigations, quickly cast suspicion on JonBenét's family as the most likely suspects, fanning the flames of media scrutiny and largely one-sided reporting, turning the case into a national obsession. Twenty-eight years later, that obsession — and finger-pointing — hasn't gone away, and the murder of JonBenét Ramsey remains unsolved. From Academy Award nominated director Joe Berlinger, this three-part docuseries investigates the mishandling of the case by law enforcement and the media, ultimately revealing the relatively simple steps that can be taken to finally solve perhaps the most infamous cold case of all time. But will Colorado authorities finally take the necessary steps to bring the vicious killer of JonBenét Ramsey to justice and allow the family to finally have peace of mind?

title: Aaron Rodgers: Enigma
synopsis: Follow NFL quarterback Aaron Rodgers as he rebounds from an Achilles injury in this sports series chronicling the defining moments of his life and career.

title: Churchill at War
synopsis: This captivating docuseries examines Winston Churchill's pivotal role in World War II and the formative events that made him an ideal leader for the era.

title: The WONDERfools
synopsis: A goofy group of townies stumbles into superpowers and fights rising evil as doomsday panic grows in this wild, turn-of-the-century action comedy.

title: Matki Pingwinów
synopsis: When her seven-year-old son moves to a new school, an MMA fighter realizes that her toughest fight won't be in the octagon, but in parenthood.

title: Echoes of the Past
synopsis: Accused of his sister's murder, Yehia is fiercely determined to seek vengeance and unmask the true perpetrator.

title: Amsterdam Empire
synopsis: Jack van Doorn, the rich and notorious founder of the coffee shop empire Jackal, has had to fight his entire career against criminals, competitors, and absurd Dutch laws to become the biggest of them all. When his affair with a well-known journalist comes to light, it turns out that his most dangerous enemy has been living under his roof all this time: his betrayed wife, Betty, an ex-pop diva who knows all his weak spots and secrets and will not rest until she has taken everything from him. Amsterdam Empire is an extravagant crime drama full of glamour and grime at the heart of the Amsterdam cannabis scene.

title: Nova Cena
synopsis: To wear the rap crown, you'll need to rule the stage. Brazilian rappers face off in this competition featuring Djonga, Filipe Ret, Tasha and Tracie.

title: UniverXO Dabiz
synopsis: He has fame, awards and Michelin stars — but amid an existential crisis, Dabiz Muñoz might close the restaurant that elevated him to world's best chef.

title: The Later Daters
synopsis: Six silver singles learn the new rules of modern dating while overcoming trust and self-esteem issues on their journey to find meaningful connections.

title: Asura
synopsis: In 1979 Tokyo, four distinct sisters uncover their aging father's affair, causing their happy facades and bottled-up emotions to slowly unravel.

title: The Kings of Tupelo: A Southern Crime Saga
synopsis: A small-town feud, an internet conspiracy, an Elvis impersonator, black market body parts, and an assassination attempt on the President. Welcome to Mississippi where this jaw-dropping story spirals from local drama to a national scandal. Buckle up for a wild ride. This isn't fiction — it's Tupelo.

title: Saudi Pro League: Kickoff
synopsis: Watch the action unfold in this gripping football documentary series, where global icons join local stars to reshape the league in its 2023/2024 season.

title: Love Never Lies: South Africa
synopsis: In South Africa's first dating show of its kind, six couples face temptations — and a ruthless lie detector — in the ultimate relationship test.

title: Ciudad de sombras
synopsis: A gruesome crime has occurred in La Pedrera - Casa Milà: a burning body appears on the façade of Gaudi's emblematic building. Inspector Milo Malart, until now suspended from his job, comes back to activity and, hand in hand with deputy inspector Rebeca Garrido, will try to find the author of this crime.

title: Celda 211
synopsis: Caught in a prison riot, a human rights lawyer poses as an inmate to survive. As he blends in, chaos and personal loss unveil the darkness within him.

title: Unchosen
synopsis: A psychological thriller set in a conservative Christian sect about a dutiful wife who is set on a dangerous path of emancipation and sexual awakening when she encounters an escaped convict.

title: Il Capo Perfetto
synopsis: Giulio Zagni is The Perfect Boss, the beloved and undisputed king of his steering wheel factory and his family. Friends, relatives, and employees may veer off course, but Giulio is always there to set things right, no matter the cost. However, when this well-oiled machine suddenly falters, the professional and personal life of this exemplary entrepreneur in Italy's Motor Valley spirals out of control. Amid tragicomic twists and strokes of genius, will Giulio manage to get back on track?

title: Harlan Coben's I Will Find You
synopsis: Harlan Coben's I Will Find You follows an innocent father serving life in prison for murdering his own son, who receives evidence that his child may actually still be alive — and must break out of prison to find the truth.

title: La Palma
synopsis: A Norwegian family vacationing on La Palma faces disaster when a young researcher discovers alarming signs of an imminent volcanic eruption.

title: Ilary
synopsis: This documentary series follows TV host Ilary Blasi as she defines her life post-divorce, balancing personal growth, career opportunities and a new love.

title: Selling the City
synopsis: A team of stylishly savvy New York real estate agents hustle to seal multimillion-dollar deals while stirring up drama in this soapy reality series.

title: I am Married…But!
synopsis: I am Married…But! explores the realities of married life. I-ling (Alice Ko) has lived with her in-laws for three years and contemplates divorce every seven days. She wants to move out but is stuck because her husband, Zeng Xue-you (Jasper Liu), is a mummy's boy. Despite her frustrations, she always finds a hint of charm in him at crucial moments, trapping her in a cycle of wanting to leave but not being able to. Things take a turn when she meets a soulmate on a dating app, her body suddenly wants a baby, placing her in a tug-of-war between emotional infidelity and family life.

title: ACAB
synopsis: A night of ferocious clashes in Val di Susa. A team from the Mobile Unit of Rome loses their chief, who is seriously injured. Mazinga, Marta and Salvatore's team, however, is not like the others, it's a team from Rome, which had to learn to contrast chaos and troubles with extreme methods as well as with the harmony of a tribe, almost like a family. A family that the new commander, Michele, part of the reformist police, will have to deal with. For such police, teams like that are the symbol of an old school that must be refounded. As if the chaos that hits the new squad at the moment of maximum internal fragility wasn't enough, there's also a new wave of people's discontent with institutions.Among rising tensions, the team members are called to take sides and forced to question the deeper meaning of their work and their own membership of the Department.

title: Trigger
synopsis: An action thriller drama that depicts what happens when guns of unknown origin are unleashed in South Korea, a gun-free country, and guns are given to angry people one by one.

title: Rugged Rugby: Conquer or Die
synopsis: In the shadows of Korea's rugby world, seven teams engage in a fierce battle of strength, strategy, and teamwork — all vying to be crowned champion.

title: Super Mâles
synopsis: Super Mâles follows a group of long-time friends, whose romantic and professional lives are turned upside down by the women in their lives. Cédric, Tom, Jérémie, and Tonio, struggle to find their place and find love in a society that questions patriarchy and gradually deprives them of their privileges.

title: Celebrity Bear Hunt
synopsis: A Spice Girl, a ballroom star, a Wimbledon champ and more walk into a jungle — and only one can emerge victorious. Who will be the last celebrity standing?

title: Kibic
synopsis: Two warring football clubs take their rivalry off the pitch and into the world of crime and violence. Teenager Kuba must do whatever it takes to survive.

title: Black Warrant
synopsis: Black Warrant follows a newly appointed jailer, Sunil and his colleagues as they navigate a system that challenges everything they believe. As Sunil grapples with moral dilemmas and power struggles, the drama reveals the raw and unfiltered reality of prison life.

title: America's Team: The Gambler and His Cowboys
synopsis: Through never-before-seen footage and interviews, this series tells the definitive story of the Dallas Cowboys and Jerry Jones' impact on NFL history.

title: Knockout
synopsis: Knockout will take an unflinching look at the life of legendary boxer and cultural icon Mike Tyson. Known as the youngest heavyweight champion in history (at the age of 20 in 1986), Tyson's legacy extends far beyond the ropes of the boxing ring, cementing him as one of the most compelling and polarizing figures of our time. From his meteoric rise as the "Baddest Man on the Planet" to his personal struggles – including a period of incarceration and widely publicized struggles (i.e. finances, substance abuse, in-ring controversies) – and eventual redemption, this series will explore the man behind the gloves.

title: Long Story Short
synopsis: Long Story Short is an animated comedy about a family over time. It's about the shared history, the inside jokes, the old wounds. If you've ever had a mother, father, sibling, partner, or child, this is the show for you — and by the way, would it kill you to call them?

title: With Love, Meghan
synopsis: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex invites friends and famous guests to a beautiful California estate, where she shares cooking, gardening and hosting tips.

title: Wzgórze psów
synopsis: A successful and renowned novelist — haunted by trauma and a mysterious blackmailer — returns to his hometown to reckon with his unresolved past.

title: Subteran
synopsis: A young mother's life is upended when she finds herself hiding behind a secret identity to escape the Bucharest gang responsible for her fiancé's death.

title: W.A.G.s to Riches
synopsis: They're the wives and girlfriends of famous athletes and rap stars, but these stylishly smart W.A.G.s call the shots in this soapy reality series.

title: Adsız Aşıklar
synopsis: Cem, scarred by a childhood that crushed his trust in love, is the invisible hero of Love Hospital, a place he established to cure those suffering from the "love disease." All of Cem's success and dreams now depend on Hazal, an unexpected presence in his life who, in stark contrast to him, believes that love will save the world.

title: My Melody & Kuromi
synopsis: Two adorable shop owners - a baker and a candy maker - must team up despite their differences to save their hometown.

title: The Roshans
synopsis: Soulful compositions. Box-office hits. A timeless legacy. This documentary series traces the lives of the Roshans and their unforgettable work.

title: Melo Movie
synopsis: Even if hardship and misfortune always accompany life, the youths who have walked with their middle finger raised now seek someone to lean on wholeheartedly, wanting to find a person to rely on as if they were to fall. Dreaming of becoming a film director one day, Kim Moo Bi, an assistant director, wants to follow in her father's footsteps, who worked as a filming crew member. After entering the film industry, she quietly honed her skills, not drawing attention to herself in the eyes of others. On the other hand, Ko Gyeom rose from being a supporting actor to becoming a film critic. He meets Moo Bi on the set of an interview film, eventually starting their own love story.

title: Surviving Black Hawk Down
synopsis: Surviving Black Hawk Down tells the gripping real story of the horror and heroism behind the events that inspired Ridley Scott's blockbuster movie Black Hawk Down, blending raw, immersive storytelling with first-person interviews from both sides of The Battle of Mogadishu.

title: American Manhunt: O.J. Simpson
synopsis: The white Bronco. The gloves. The trial of the century. This documentary series investigates the shocking murder case that became a cultural phenomenon.

title: Court of Gold
synopsis: For the first time ever, top medal contenders in men's basketball granted behind-the-scenes access at the Olympic Games Paris 2024. Court of Gold gives an unfiltered, insider look at Team USA, France, Serbia and Canada as they gear up and battle for gold in Paris. International basketball has caught up to the U.S. and the competition and stakes are higher than ever.

title: Les Lionnes
synopsis: In the working-class neighborhoods of the South of France, four women with quite different profiles and in financial difficulty realize that it is not so complicated to rob a bank. They will quickly find themselves in a vicious cycle...

title: Tiệm ăn của quỷ
synopsis: In a secluded part of town, a mysterious chef cooks up supernatural meals that grant his guests' deepest desires – if they're willing to pay the price.

title: Little House on the Prairie
synopsis: A transformed adaptation of Wilder's semi-autobiographical books, the new Little House on the Prairie is part family drama, part epic survival tale, and part origin story of the American West. The series will offer a kaleidoscopic view of the struggles and triumphs of those who shaped the frontier.

title: American Murder: Gabby Petito
synopsis: What happened in the final days of Gabby Petito's life? In this gripping true-crime series, her loved ones reveal the untold story of her tragic murder.

title: Olympo
synopsis: After her best friend collapses in training, talented swimmer Amaia stops at nothing to uncover the truth — even if it risks her Olympic dreams.

title: Son of a Donkey
synopsis: We meet Theo just as he moves out of his home to claim his independence — until he's faced with the harsh realities of adulthood. From driving fines and daddy issues to internet scams and a lot of therapy, Theo and his best friend Johnny get up to their usual antics as they come to terms with what's most important: family.

title: Die Falle
synopsis: Die Falle follows famous author Lisa Konrad, who has not left her house for a decade after witnessing the murder of her sister. One night she sees who she believes was the murdered on television, and decides to use herself as bait to catch them.

title: Motorvalley
synopsis: Arturo, Elena and Blu have lost almost everything in their lives, but one thing still lights them up: the love for cars and adrenaline. Elena, a young member of the Dionisi family, owner of a famous motorsport team, must regain a role in the family business, now in the hands of her brother; she hires Blu, a young hothead with a fatal attraction to speed, and Arturo, a famous pilot who has now fallen from grace, to train her. Each of them has a reason to run faster than the others.

title: Aitana: Metamorphosis
synopsis: In this documentary series, Aitana reveals intimate moments and reflects on her journey from regular teen to international pop sensation.

title: Néro
synopsis: Southern France, 1504. Nero is a cynical and surly assassin who is betrayed by his master and long-term ally. Running from the dangerous enemies now after him, he discovers his own orphaned daughter Perla. On their journey between vengeance and redemption, Nero will have to choose: saving himself or saving his daughter — and the world.

title: Dala Bupha Khattakam
synopsis: When her client dies on the eve of his wedding, a florist sets out to find the killer, unearthing high society's dark secrets — while keeping her own.

title: Hollywood Arts
synopsis: Hollywood Arts follows Trina Vega returning to her old stomping grounds as the newest teacher at Hollywood's most elite performing arts school.

title: Dog Days Out
synopsis: Adorable dogs let their imaginations run wild on zany adventures with their favorite toys in this non-dialogue series fueled by furry fun.

title: The Boys from Brazil
synopsis: Lieberman, a famous Nazi hunter, is drawn to investigate a conspiracy spun to him by a young Nazi hunter. Lieberman is highly skeptical of the young man's claims that notorious Dr. Josef Mengele is in Paraguay, starting on a diabolical plan to reestablish the Third Reich through a cloning plan put in place after Germany lost World War II. When the young Nazi hunter is killed, Lieberman heads to Paraguay to uncover a truth that turns out to be horrific.

title: Everybody's Live with John Mulaney
synopsis: The Comeback Kid. Baby J. Andrew Glouberman. John Mulaney has many names in the Netflix universe, and he's about to claim one more: live variety talk show host.

title: Offline Love
synopsis: Ten singles gather in the dreamy city of Nice to find love without any digital devices. Will they find their match with just a paper guidebook and luck?

title: American Manhunt: Osama bin Laden
synopsis: Featuring rare footage and interviews with CIA insiders, this edge-of-your-seat documentary series traces the epic hunt for Osama bin Laden.

title: Geleceğe Mektuplar
synopsis: When a young woman discovers a long-buried secret about her past, she must trace back a collection of letters to their writers to uncover the truth.

title: Manual para señoritas
synopsis: Hired to find husbands for three wealthy sisters, chaperone Elena Bianda is drawn into a late 19th-century world of love, scandal and comic intrigue.

title: Man vs Baby
synopsis: In this watch-together comedy series, fumbling house-sitter Trevor unleashes chaos when he's left in charge of a lost baby just days before Christmas.

title: Bir İhtimal Daha Var
synopsis: A down-and-out sports betting writer is roped into teaming up with the ghost of a bossy business tycoon demanding to crack his own murder case.

title: Screwballs
synopsis: Five siblings face endless missions in this pure entertainment variety show. With a few screws loose, they embrace chaos in their search for sanity.

title: Tylko jedno spojrzenie
synopsis: Greta's life unravels after finding a mysterious photograph of her husband from years ago. When he disappears, she is forced to uncover his dark past.

title: Million Dollar Secret
synopsis: Million Dollar Secret In this cutthroat competition series, an undercover millionaire must hide in plain sight and evade elimination to keep the money and win the game.

title: Gold & Greed: The Hunt for Fenn's Treasure
synopsis: Fortune or folly? In this documentary series, real-life treasure hunters dive into a years-long search for hidden riches in the Rocky Mountains.

title: WWE Superstar Profiles
synopsis: No synopsis available.

title: WWE Legend Profiles
synopsis: No synopsis available.

title: Tuiskoms
synopsis: When a video of Fleur's lowest moment goes viral, she loses everything she has, forcing her to move back in with her parents and start her life over.

title: Medusa
synopsis: Somebody wants to kill CEO Bárbara Hidalgo. Can she find the culprit as her family schemes ruthlessly for control of their Colombian business empire?

title: Leanne
synopsis: Leanne's life takes an unexpected turn when her husband of 33 years leaves her for another woman. Starting over when you're a grandmother and in menopause isn't exactly what she had in mind, but with the help of her family she will navigate this new chapter with grace, dignity and jello salad.

title: Katrina: Come Hell and High Water
synopsis: In Katrina: Come Hell and High Water, the people of New Orleans share their stories in their own words — from what it was like to survive the hurricane to how the city and their lives have been forever changed as a result. Brimming with emotion, the series serves as a testament to the resilience of New Orleanians and a stark call for vigilance and preparation as cataclysmic natural disasters continue to become more and more commonplace all over the world.

title: The Clubhouse: A Year with the Red Sox
synopsis: Follows the Boston Red Sox during the 2024 MLB season with unprecedented access to players, coaches and executives.

title: Gone Girls: The Long Island Serial Killer
synopsis: This tense true-crime series examines the hunt for the Long Island serial killer through the perspective of his victims, their loved ones and the police.

title: Superestar
synopsis: At the turn of the century, a comet crossed the Spanish sky, shattering the laws of fame and success and dissolving the line between the popular and the underground. For a few years, the front pages and prime time were taken over by celebrities from another dimension. Creatures who, until then, seemed condemned to ridicule and contempt, who caught our attention without adapting to any kind of normality. A magical story with room for esoteric conspiracies, eternal nights, quantum bricks, multicolored supervillains and an improbability made star: Tamara.

title: Nemesis
synopsis: A driven LAPD cop faces off with the master criminal behind a string of bold robberies in this high-stakes crime drama from the creator of "Power."

title: L'amore è cieco: Italia
synopsis: This iconic social experiment turns traditional dating on its head, as Italian singles fall in love and get engaged — all before meeting in person.

title: Vladimir
synopsis: In Vladimir, as a woman's life unravels, she becomes obsessed with her captivating new colleague. Full of sexy secrets and dark humor, the series is about what happens when a woman goes hell-bent to turn her fantasies into reality.

title: Bienvenidos a la familia
synopsis: A struggling single mom rallies her quirky family to outsmart a mafia boss after her estranged, wealthy father dies, leaving them with massive debt.

title: Go!
synopsis: A young sprinter, Siya, is given a life-changing scholarship to a prestigious school in Johannesburg. While racing toward his dreams of athletic success, he must also outrun the trauma and painful memories that haunt him, learning that the real race is not only on the track but also within himself.

title: El jardinero
synopsis: El jardinero tells the story of Elmer and his controlling mother, La China Jurado, who runs a garden centre that hides another thriving underground murder-for-hire business. Killing is easy for Elmer. An accident has left him emotionless. However, while planning the murder of Violet, a charming nursery school teacher, he falls in love with her. Elmer must learn to love while his mother does everything she can to end Violet's life.

title: Reservatet
synopsis: When a neighbor's au pair vanishes from her wealthy suburb, Cecilie seeks answers — and unravels secrets that shatter her seemingly perfect world.

title: De rockstar à tueur: le cas Cantat
synopsis: In 2003, rock singer Bertrand Cantat killed his partner, actress Marie Trintignant. This documentary revisits the case that divided a nation.

title: Teach You a Lesson
synopsis: When respect collapses in schools, a special unit arrives to set things right — with sharp, no-nonsense lessons you won't find in textbooks.

title: Forget You Not
synopsis: After multiple crises turn her life upside down, a convenience store clerk discovers a surprising creative outlet to restore her hope: stand-up comedy.

title: Turning Point: The Vietnam War
synopsis: This thought-provoking documentary series examines the harrowing consequences of the Vietnam War, from the Gulf of Tonkin incident to the fall of Saigon.

title: Khakee: The Bengal Chapter
synopsis: A dreaded gangster, his menacing aides and a political party with skeletons in its closet — there's a lot for Officer Arjun Maitra to navigate in Bengal.

title: Inside
synopsis: Ten influencers. One house. One million pounds. All the Insiders have to do is complete the challenges and not blow the cash — easy, right?

title: Kian's Bizarre B&B
synopsis: On a remote island, Kian84 hosts a quirky B&B escape, where BTS' Jin and Ji Ye-eun lead guests through playful exploits and delightful chaos.

title: Carlos Alcaraz: A mi manera
synopsis: This documentary series follows Carlos Alcaraz as he balances the pressures of a phenomenal tennis career with a 20-year-old's desire to let loose.

title: Bad Thoughts
synopsis: A collection of hilariously disturbing stories that push the boundaries of decency in ways only Tom Segura could imagine.

title: Recalé
synopsis: Eddy, a math genius and small-time crook, avoids jail-time by going undercover as a teacher. His mission: to identify the kid of a major criminal.

title: Congonhas: Tragédia Anunciada
synopsis: The untold stories and human tragedy behind Latin America's deadliest air disaster are investigated in this three-part documentary series.

title: Pop the Balloon LIVE
synopsis: Reality stars and everyday singles test their romantic chemistry in this live dating experiment hosted by Yvonne Orji.

title: Santas garnachas
synopsis: A flavorful exploration of Mexico's street food scene, where the beloved garnacha takes center stage, sparks debates and unites fans with every bite.

title: The Diamond Heist
synopsis: Get in the Dome. Get the diamond. Get away. In this documentary executive produced by Guy Ritchie, a group of gangsters plan the heist of a lifetime.

title: Angi: Crimen y mentira
synopsis: Ana Páez was a 35-year-old fashion designer who was found dead in a tourist apartment in Barcelona on February 19, 2008, naked and with a plastic bag covering her head. How did she die? Was it a sexual crime or a sadistic game gone wrong? This was the initial hypothesis with which the police were working until Angi appeared. This documentary miniseries revisits what the media dubbed 'The Almost Perfect Crime' and sheds light on the figure of María Ángeles Molina ('Angi') and her past with her husband, Juan Antonio Álvarez Litben, who died unexpectedly in 1996.

title: Legado
synopsis: After a grave illness, a media mogul discovers his children's tactics threaten the empire he carefully built — and he'll do whatever it takes to save it.

title: Blippi's Job Show
synopsis: From flying to the moon to making the perfect pizza, Blippi and Meekah are learning about the world's coolest jobs — and making new friends along the way!

title: Battle Camp
synopsis: In Battle Camp, the greatest stars from across Netflix's broad slate of reality and doc-series return to face the ultimate physical and mental competition, where a giant spinning wheel randomly decides who stays and who goes. In order to keep your name off that wheel, our returning fan favorites need to be unbeatable in high octane challenges, unbreakable in grueling punishments and, last but certainly not least, unhateable in camp, as everyone has a vote. The player who achieves all three, becomes the ultimate Netflix reality competitor and takes home the $250,000 prize.

title: Bad Influence: The Dark Side of Kidfluencing
synopsis: In this eye-opening documentary exposé, teens and parents reveal disturbing accounts of abuse and exploitation within the world of child influencers.

title: Pride and Prejudice
synopsis: The adaptation will hew closely to the original text, reuniting existing fans with the timeless novel, while also introducing a new generation to Austen.

title: İstanbul Ansiklopedisi
synopsis: A young student moves in with an estranged family friend in Istanbul, trading her humble hometown for a city that tests her identity — and convictions.

title: Dead Letters
synopsis: An addictive mystery whodunit-meets-psychological thriller centered on a pair of identical twin sisters, Ava and Zelda. When Ava returns home to the family vineyard in the wake of Zelda's sudden death, she must find out who murdered her beloved twin while reckoning with dangerous revelations about the woman Zelda had become in her absence. To complicate matters: Zelda knew she was in serious danger, so she left behind letters for Ava. Zelda's cryptic and gut-wrenching "dead letters" send Ava on a twisted scavenger hunt for the truth — forcing Ava to question everyone she's ever loved.

title: Yo no soy Mendoza
synopsis: Good-hearted Julián is kidnapped to impersonate a corrupt casino owner, marry his fiancée and outwit the mafia — though romance was never part of the plan.

title: Race For The Crown
synopsis: This rousing documentary series tails jockeys, trainers and owners as they chase titles and triumph in the Triple Crown of thoroughbred horse racing.

title: Bet
synopsis: At a private school where gambling determines social status, a skillful new student with a mysterious past is shaking things up — and betting on revenge.

title: WWE: Unreal
synopsis: See John Cena, Cody Rhodes, Rhea Ripley and other Superstars like never before in this unprecedented backstage look at the WWE Universe.

title: Cold Case: The Tylenol Murders
synopsis: Cold Case: The Tylenol Murders is a gripping three-part docuseries that revisits a chilling crime that shattered the nation's trust in the safety of everyday brands. Chicago, 1982: at least seven people die after ingesting cyanide-laced Tylenol capsules, sparking nationwide panic and one of the largest criminal investigations in U.S. history. Is there one mastermind behind these horrific deaths, or is that simply a convenient scapegoat in a darker conspiracy and potential cover-up? The series reopens the case that turned the world's best-selling drug into a terrifying symbol—and changed forever how we view the products in our own medicine cabinets.

title: The Age of Innocence
synopsis: Based on Wharton's novel of forbidden love in 19th-century New York, The Age of Innocence follows a passionate and heartrending will they, won't they love triangle while exploring themes of freedom, duty, identity, and love in all its forms. The new take promises to be true to Wharton's novel but will speak to a new generation as it traverses the ballrooms and bedrooms of its young characters, asking what is love — and what is lust. And should we ultimately be driven by our heads, or by our hearts?

title: Unaccustomed Earth
synopsis: Inspired by the internationally beloved bestseller of the same name, Unaccustomed Earth is an epic, soapy drama about a tight-knit immigrant community navigating love, desire, and belonging. When a star-crossed romance between a devoted wife and her long-lost love comes to light, a scandalous affair is born and new battle lines are drawn in the elite, insular Indian American community of Cambridge, Massachusetts. Rich with passion and unforgettable characters, Unaccustomed Earth is an intimate, nuanced look inside a tight-knit community.

title: Sneaky Links: Dating After Dark
synopsis: Six sexy singles check into a motel in pursuit of true love, only to discover their longtime booty calls, or "sneaky links," are there as well. Facing desires old and new, and many hard truths, guests must decide whether to strengthen their sneaky link or explore new connections. Will they stay sneaky, or is love worth "checking out"?

title: Miss Governor
synopsis: As she tries to shine in politics, Mississippi's first Black lieutenant governor must manage her zany family and overcome a boss who's stuck in the past.

title: Fred & Rose West: A British Horror Story
synopsis: Recently discovered police recordings and first-person accounts tell the story of Fred and Rose West, two of the UK's most prolific murderers.

title: Franklin
synopsis: A counterfeit artist, also a single father, is forced to work with his ex-lover to craft the perfect $100 bill — all to save his dying daughter.

title: Dead-End Job
synopsis: Dead-End Job follows, a young man who takes on a seemingly perfect part-time job offering 50 times the usual hourly wage through a mysterious employment agency called Spyder Human Resource Center. However, the job quickly becomes a nightmare as he encounters strange and terrifying phenomena.

title: Cheat: Unfinished Business
synopsis: Sun, scandal and second chances collide in this reality show in which former cheaters reconnect with their exes. With Amanda Holden and Paul C. Brunson.

title: Mad Unicorn
synopsis: Santi has struggled to survive since childhood. Now, he risks everything to take his startup business to the big leagues. Inspired by true events.

title: Mating Season
synopsis: Mating Season is set in the animal world starring a cast of bears, raccoons, deer, foxes and a host of other horny, lovable forest critters, as they navigate love, sexual relationships and the universal need to hook up and find a partner.

title: Yolanthe
synopsis: Join Yolanthe Cabau on an emotional journey of highs and lows as she leaves the Dutch capital for a fresh start in LA with her 8-year-old son.

title: Too Hot to Handle: Italia
synopsis: A group of flirty singles mixes in paradise, but to win the cash prize, there's a catch: no sex. Will they resist temptation or let desire take over?

title: Serpientes y escaleras
synopsis: An ambitious but overlooked teacher wants to be head of a prestigious school, but must climb a slippery ladder of lies and corruption to reach the top.

title: Nowe Rozdanie: Rhythm + Flow Polska
synopsis: Aspiring Polish rappers drop bars, battle, and craft tracks to impress judges Bedoes 2115, DZIARMA, and Sokół — vying for fame and a 500,000 złoty prize.

title: The Survivors
synopsis: Fifteen years ago, the loss of three young people tore this sleepy seaside town apart. Now, the mysterious death of a young woman dredges up the past.

title: Os Donos do Jogo
synopsis: The Rio de Janeiro crime mafia is in turmoil with the imminent legalization of gambling, the interest of a foreign criminal group in the local market and the rapid rise of Profeta, a new aspirant to the city's throne.

title: Y a-t-il un dealer dans l'avion ?
synopsis: On March 20, 2013, four French nationals are arrested on board a private jet in the Punta Cana airport, Dominican Republic: two ex-air force pilots and two passengers about to take off for Saint-Tropez. On board: 700 kg of cocaine stored in 26 suitcases. None of them has the profile of an international drug smuggler and no one knows who the luggage belongs to. Who isn't telling the whole truth? Who's involved in the case? And what is hiding behind the mountain of drugs?

title: Maschi veri
synopsis: Four old friends, Massimo, Mattia, Luigi and Riccardo, juggle relationships, careers and dating in a modern world set on giving masculinity a hard time.

title: Losmen Bu Broto: The Series
synopsis: For the Broto family, managing their beloved Yogyakarta inn is no easy feat — especially when their youngest son falls in love with a married guest.

title: El refugio atómico
synopsis: In a luxury bunker designed to endure any imaginable catastrophe, a group of billionaires is forced to coexist after locking themselves in due to the threat of an unprecedented global conflict. Kimera Underground Park becomes a claustrophobic setting for two families marked by a wound from the past. Isolated underground and with no possibility of escape, they unleash personalities uncovering their most unconfessable secrets. But the most unexpected alliances also emerge. An excessive and surprising emotional X-ray of billionaires living in a golden hole.

title: The Altruists
synopsis: The Altruists tells the story of Sam Bankman-Fried and Caroline Ellison, two hyper-smart, ambitious young idealists who tried to remake the global financial system in the blink of an eye – and then seduced, coaxed and teased each other into stealing $8 billion.

title: Power Moves with Shaquille O'Neal
synopsis: In this candid documentary series, NBA legends Shaquille O'Neal and Allen Iverson work to revive Reebok's legacy and find a rising star to rep the brand.

title: Aniela
synopsis: After her wealthy husband leaves her with nothing, a high-society Warsaw snob is forced to use the only survival skills she has left — her sharp wit.

title: 7 Bears
synopsis: Forget the Seven Dwarfs, here come the Seven Bears! So, watch out Cinderella, Little Red Riding Hood, and Snow White, because this adorable group of furry friends is about to shake up the fairy tales we thought we knew.

title: Mis muertos tristes
synopsis: Ema, a 60-year-old doctor, can see and hear the dead. She calls them "presences" and has lived her entire life avoiding letting this gift connect her with the suffering of others. But when her niece Julie — a disturbed young woman who can also communicate with the dead, but in a much more intense and sexual manner — arrives at her house, Ema is forced to get involved. What begins as a family reunion turns into a disturbing chain of events that alters the balance between the world of the living and the dead, infecting an entire neighborhood with voices from beyond. As the borders between life, death, and desire blur, Ema will have to confront her past, her daughter, and the ghosts she never let go.

title: Leviathan
synopsis: Set in an alternate steampunk past, an Austrian fugitive prince and a Scottish airman in disguise embark on an unexpected quest to prevent a world war.

title: Las mil muertes de Nora Dalmasso
synopsis: This is the untold story of Nora Dalmasso's shocking murder, with exclusive interviews from her husband Marcelo, son Facundo and daughter Valentina.

title: Stranger Things: Tales from '85
synopsis: In the winter of 1985, snow blankets the town and the horrors of the Upside Down are finally fading. Our heroes Eleven, Mike, Will, Dustin, Lucas, and Max have settled back into a normal life of D&D, snowball fights, and quiet days. But beneath the ice, something terrifying has awakened. Could it be from the Upside Down? From the depths of Hawkins Lab? Or from somewhere else entirely? Our heroes must race to solve this mystery and save Hawkins in this new story set in the Stranger Things universe.

title: Haunted Hotel
synopsis: A single mother of two struggles to run a haunted hotel with the help of her estranged brother, who is now one of the ghosts haunting the hotel and thinks the other ghosts have some pretty good ideas.

title: Trainwreck
synopsis: 8-part documentary anthology that focuses on some of the wildest and most bizarre events ever to blow up in mainstream media. Each week, tune in to a new story told from the perspective of those at the heartbeat of the chaos. Opening with the tragedy of the 2021 Astroworld Festival, the series then ranges from political scandals and media hoaxes to cult-like corporations and reality TV disasters. Trainwreck delves into the stories the world could not look away from.

title: Better Late Than Single
synopsis: Ready to step into the dating world, lifelong singles get expert help for style, health and confidence. Will they manage hiccups on their way to love?

title: Soleil noir
synopsis: When a mysterious message lures young mother Alba to work at the Lasserre rose farm, her new job quickly spirals into murder and family revelations.

title: Jugando con fuego: España
synopsis: A group of flirty Spanish singles expect sun, parties and steamy hookups, but they quickly learn that winning €100,000 requires giving up sex completely.

title: Marked
synopsis: To save her daughter, a cash-in-transit vehicle security guard agrees to be the inside woman on a heist, but when she's betrayed, she'll become worse than any of her newfound enemies.

title: The East Palace
synopsis: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

title: Had I Not Seen the Sun
synopsis: Notorious serial killer Lee Ren-yao receives an interview from a documentary crew, triggering a string of mysterious events tied to a buried past.

title: Halva Malmö består av killar som dumpat mig
synopsis: Hopelessly optimistic but eternally single, 30-something Amanda decides to break her celibacy streak and throw herself into dating.

title: My Brilliant Career
synopsis: Set in rural Australia at the turn of the 20th century, the series follows Sybylla Melvyn, a spirited and ambitious young woman who dreams of literary fame and refuses to conform to the limited expectations placed upon women of her era.

title: As You Stood By
synopsis: When two women plot to end an abusive marriage through murder, an unexpected visitor arrives — threatening to shatter everything they've carefully planned.

title: Las Muertas
synopsis: Based on Jorge Ibargüengoitia's novel, the series tells how the Baladro sisters built a brothel empire and became merciless killers in 1960s Mexico.

title: Trinity
synopsis: A heroic female naval officer becomes involved with the outwardly charismatic secretary of defense, only to discover he may be at the heart of a dangerous conspiracy.

title: Critical: Between Life and Death
synopsis: In London, a major trauma happens every 60 minutes, and for the NHS, each call is a race against time. Critical: Between Life and Death gets inside the minds of the dedicated trauma teams that hold our lives in their hands when the worst happens.From the makers of the award-winning 24 Hours in A&E and with exclusive access, 40 cameras are embedded for 21 days across the entire London Major Trauma System. The documentary series goes over the shoulder and under the scalpel to reveal not only the life-saving interventions but also the personal, emotional, and sometimes traumatic reasons that inspire those on the NHS frontline to do a job where every second counts.

title: Hitmakers
synopsis: In this glitzy reality series, under-the-radar talents head to high-stakes songwriting camps in Nashville, the Bahamas and Cabo to pen the next big hit.

title: Amy Bradley Is Missing
synopsis: This true-crime series investigates the 1998 disappearance of a 23-year-old woman from a Caribbean cruise and her family's tireless search for answers.

title: The Savage, Noble Death Of Babs Dionne
synopsis: The crime-thriller centers on Babs Dionne, a proud Franco-American, doting grandmother, and vicious crime matriarch, who rules her small town of Waterville, Maine, with an iron fist. She controls the flow of drugs into Little Canada with the help of her loyal lieutenants, girlfriends since they were teenagers, and her eldest daughter, Lori, a Marine vet struggling with addiction. When a drug kingpin discovers that his numbers are down in the upper northeast, he sends a malevolent force, known only as The Man, to investigate. At the same time, Babs's youngest daughter, Sis, has gone missing, which doesn't seem at all like a coincidence. In twenty-four hours, Sis will be found dead, and the whole town will seek shelter from Babs's wrath.

title: Attack on London: Hunting the 7/7 Bombers
synopsis: Insider accounts and never-seen-before footage tell the story of the 7/7 bombings on London's transport network in 2005 — and its explosive aftermath.

title: What's in the Box
synopsis: In this game show hosted by Neil Patrick Harris, players answer trivia to win spectacular hidden prizes — but can they keep them from the competition?

title: All the Sharks
synopsis: Four teams of shark experts and enthusiasts travel the globe trying to find the most elusive shark species in this fin-tastic reality competition.

title: Kacken an der Havel
synopsis: Rapper Toni returns to his hometown for his mother's funeral and suddenly finds himself juggling career dreams and surprise fatherhood to a teenage son.

title: Pssica
synopsis: Three lives intertwine in an unexpected way in the rivers of the Atlantic Amazon: Janalice, a young woman kidnapped by human trafficking; Preá, who needs to come to terms with his destiny as the leader of a gang that operates on the region's rivers; and Mariangel, who seeks revenge for the death of her family. The three will try to survive the "psychic", a curse that they believe has been cast upon them.

title: En el barro
synopsis: Five female convicts forge a unique bond after a deadly accident... until corruption and turf wars within a ruthless prison threaten to destroy them.

title: Il Mostro
synopsis: Eight double murders. Seventeen years of terror. Always the same weapon. A .22 caliber Beretta. One of the longest and most complex Italian investigations into the first and most brutal serial killer in the country's history: Il Mostro di Firenze. A series based on true events, direct testimonies, procedural documents and journalistic investigations. All terribly true. Because we believe that telling the truth, and only that, is the only way to bring justice to the victims. In a story where there have been many possible monsters, over time and investigations, our story focuses on them, the possible monsters, from their point of view. Because the monster, in the end, could be anyone.

title: Conversations with a Killer: The Son of Sam Tapes
synopsis: One of the greatest manhunts in New York City history comes to life in this gripping three-part series. Conversations with a Killer: The Son of Sam Tapes takes viewers inside the NYPD's desperate race to catch the infamous .44-caliber killer—and into the disturbing mind of David Berkowitz himself. Newly unearthed recordings offer rare insight into his twisted psyche, revealing what was going through his mind as he unleashed a reign of terror in the late 1970s. Alongside firsthand accounts from cops, journalists, and survivors, the series unpacks how fear spread through the streets, fueled by cryptic letters, a frenzied press, and a killer who seemed to be everywhere and nowhere at once. From Emmy-winning and Academy Award nominated director Joe Berlinger, this chilling new chapter of Conversations with a Killer delves into one of the most infamous cases in American history.

title: Off Road
synopsis: Two Israeli actors embark on an unforgettable road trip across Central Asia to learn more about themselves and the people they encounter along the way.

title: Pour le meilleur et à l'aveugle
synopsis: Divided into pods, French singles date and get engaged — sight unseen. Is love truly blind? A social experiment hosted by Luthna Plocus and Teddy Riner.

title: Baby Farm
synopsis: A young pregnant woman accepts help from a high-profile organization offering support — and becomes a prisoner in their sinister plot.

title: Catalog
synopsis: A recently widowed workaholic clumsily navigates life with his kids, guided by his late wife's online tips. Can he ace this crash course in parenthood?

title: Delirio
synopsis: When his wife Agustina falls into delirium, a professor delves into her dark past to piece together her story and uncover the cause of her madness.

title: Pecados Inconfesables
synopsis: Trapped in a controlling marriage, a woman starts an affair with a younger man for comfort and revenge, but their liaison transforms into a perilous battle to stay alive.

title: Saare Jahan Se Accha
synopsis: A resilient Indian spy must defeat his counterpart across the border in a battle of wits and tradecraft to sabotage their nuclear program.

title: The Echoes of Survivors: Inside Korea's Tragedies
synopsis: This documentary series reveals the harrowing tales of those who survived Korea's gloomiest chapters, shedding a light on long-hidden truths.

title: To Kill A Monkey
synopsis: An old friend coaxes Efemini into the alluring world of cybercrime, where every decision he makes draws him deeper into a moral minefield.

title: SEC Football: Any Given Saturday
synopsis: SEC Football: Any Given Saturday takes fans deep inside the Southeastern Conference (SEC) during the 2024 season, offering unprecedented access to the players, coaches, and programs that define the sport's most dominant league.

title: Pokémon Tales: The Misadventures of Sirfetch'd and Pichu
synopsis: No synopsis available.

title: Dos tumbas
synopsis: Two years after the disappearance of Verónica and Marta, two 16-year-old friends, the investigation is declared closed due to lack of evidence and suspects. The grandmother of one of the two girls, Isabel, who has nothing to lose, decides to carry out an investigation beyond the law. Isabel will do whatever it takes to uncover the truth about what happened that night and what begins as the search for a culprit, soon becomes a story of revenge.

title: Fit for TV: The Reality of the Biggest Loser
synopsis: Fit for TV: The Reality of The Biggest Loser is a three-part documentary series that takes an inside look at the making of the hit reality TV competition, exploring the good, the bad, and the complicated. Featuring interviews with former contestants, trainers, producers, and health professionals, the documentary examines the show's approach to transformation, the support systems in place, and the unique challenges of filming reality television. The series explores how the experience shaped the lives of those involved with the show long after the cameras stopped rolling and invites viewers to reflect on the balance between entertainment and well-being, and what it truly means to pursue lasting change.

title: Young Millionaires
synopsis: Friday the 13th in Marseille, childhood friends Samia, Léo, David and Jess hit the lottery jackpot. But at 17, it's impossible to cash the ticket... the first problem of a long series, because hitting the jackpot at this age opens the door to an avalanche of problems. Because you can't be serious when you're 17 with 17 million!

title: Romantics Anonymous
synopsis: Thanks to their love of chocolate, Sosuke and Hana have a chance encounter. However, due to their social anxiety, Sosuke can't touch, and Hana can't make eye contact, which brings unique challenges to their budding relationship.

title: Trainwreck: Storm Area 51
synopsis: A viral joke about storming a secretive US Air Force base sparks a meme-fueled media frenzy and puts the military on alert in this bizarre true story.

title: All the Sinners Bleed
synopsis: Haunted by his devout mother's untimely death, the first Black Sheriff in a small Bible Belt county must lead the hunt for a serial killer that has been preying on his Black community for years in the name of God.

title: Dr. Seuss's Red Fish, Blue Fish
synopsis: Building a snowman under the sea? Meeting a shark and serving him tea? Red and Blue's days are full of surprises, with ocean pals of all shapes and sizes!

title: Final Draft
synopsis: Twenty-five athletes, most retired, compete to win 30M yen to launch their second career. Can they overcome tough physical and psychological challenges?

title: Ratu Ratu Queens: The Series
synopsis: Leaving behind their homes in Indonesia, four women form an unlikely friendship and face eccentric dilemmas as they navigate life in New York.

title: Big Mistakes
synopsis: Big Mistakes follows Nicky and Morgan, two deeply incapable siblings who are in over their heads when a misguided theft for their dying grandmother accidentally pulls them into the world of organized crime. Blackmailed into increasingly dangerous assignments, they clumsily fail upwards, sinking deeper into chaos they're ill-equipped to handle.

title: aka Charlie Sheen
synopsis: After 7 years sober, Charlie Sheen candidly discusses his rise to fame and public downfall, joined by family and friends who share untold stories of his journey through stardom, struggles, and redemption.

title: You and Everything Else
synopsis: From teen years to adulthood, two friends linked by warmth and tension grow apart -- until one is asked to accompany the other through her final days.

title: Animal
synopsis: One minute he's elbow-deep in a pregnant cow; the next, he's wading through designer pet collars and expensive kibble. That's life for cranky vet Antón!

title: Platonik: Mavi Dolunay Otel
synopsis: When a suave guest with a hidden agenda checks into the Blue Moon Hotel, he forms a bizarre and messy love triangle with the two sisters who work there.

title: Las maldiciones
synopsis: In northern Argentina, the governor's daughter is kidnapped by his trusted man while a crucial lithium exploitation law is being voted on. As the kidnapper's motivations are revealed, a secret plot that began to develop 13 years ago comes to light, challenging the girl's identity. The race-against-time negotiation exposes the true nature of power, the limits of love, and the curses of kinship.

title: Next Gen Chef
synopsis: From fast casual to fine dining, rising chefs dish out bold flavors for a panel of VIP judges and culinary greats in this one-of-a-kind competition.

title: Matchroom: The Greatest Showmen
synopsis: Meet Barry and Eddie Hearn. These Essex entrepreneurs run a billion-quid sports promotion company in Brentwood — and they're aiming for world domination.

title: Monster: The Ed Gein Story
synopsis: Serial killer. Grave robber. Psycho. In the frozen fields of 1950s rural Wisconsin, a friendly, mild-mannered recluse named Eddie Gein lived quietly on a decaying farm – hiding a house of horrors so gruesome it would redefine the American nightmare. Driven by isolation, psychosis, and an all-consuming obsession with his mother, Gein's perverse crimes birthed a new kind of monster that would haunt Hollywood for decades. From Psycho to The Texas Chainsaw Massacre to The Silence of the Lambs, Gein's macabre legacy gave birth to fictional monsters born in his image and ignited a cultural obsession with the criminally deviant. Ed Gein didn't just influence a genre -- he became the blueprint for modern horror.Ryan Murphy and Ian Brennan's groundbreaking anthology series returns with its third, most harrowing installment yet. Monster: The Ed Gein Story tells the story of how one simple man in Plainfield, Wisconsin became history's most singular ghoul. He revealed to the world the most horrific truth of all -- that monsters aren't born, they're made...by us.

title: Mercenary: An Extraction Series
synopsis: Set in the high-octane world of Extraction, this action thriller follows a mercenary as he navigates a dangerous mission to rescue hostages in Libya. Trapped between warring factions and ruthless killers, the series delves into the emotional struggles of conflicted and flawed characters, each facing trauma, betrayal, and life-or-death choices.

title: La huésped
synopsis: When Sonia seeks refuge with her friend Silvia, she's intent on being the perfect guest. But beneath a charming exterior lies a well of secrets.

title: Inside: USA
synopsis: Content creators scheme, sabotage and spend in wild challenges to win up to $1M in the first US series from British YouTube collective the Sidemen.

title: Love me or leave me. Kochaj albo rzuć
synopsis: No synopsis available.

title: Love Con Revenge
synopsis: Victims of romance scams try to reclaim their lives with help from "The Tinder Swindler" target Cecilie Fjellhøy and private investigator Brianne Joseph.

title: Six Kings Slam
synopsis: The world's top-ranked players take the court in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia for a star-studded tennis showcase with ultimate bragging rights on the line.

title: Countdown: Canelo vs. Crawford
synopsis: Josh Brolin narrates an intimate look at Canelo Álvarez and Terence Crawford's preparations and lives before their historic super middleweight clash.

title: Crew Girl
synopsis: Crew Girl is described as a frothy, coming-of-age teen drama about a 16-year-old female rower Teagan who becomes the coxswain of a dysfunctional all-boys rowing team at an elite East Coast Prep School. Warring rivals, messy romantic entanglements, and betrayed friendships spill drama both in and out of the boat. Not to mention her complicated relationship with her mom, Ella. The team's a mess, her life's a mess. Can she fix both and win?

title: Kiss or Die
synopsis: Comedians ad-lib their way through irresistibly bawdy scenarios in this series produced by variety show veteran Nobuyuki Sakuma ("Last One Standing").

title: Dr. Seuss's Horton!
synopsis: Horton! follows the exciting and whimsical adventures of a young Horton and his best bud Samson as they go on adventures to help the citizens of the Jungle of Nool.

title: Dr. Seuss's Specials
